title: Classic Dutch Casserole
description: A hearty and comforting Dutch casserole recipe made with fluffy rice, flavorful frankfurter, and a crispy top.
instructions: Cook the fluffy rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté the sliced frankfurter and chopped onion until the onion is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a separate saucepan, heat the casserole over medium heat.
Stir in the milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the cooked rice, sautéed frankfurter mixture, and a pinch of salt and pepper to the saucepan.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and dot the top with butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
